name: @hasna/emails
description: Email management CLI + MCP server + dashboard for Resend and AWS SES

scripts.build: bun build src/cli/index.tsx --outdir dist/cli --target bun --external ink --external react --external chalk --external @modelcontextprotocol/sdk && bun build src/mcp/index.ts --outdir dist/mcp --target bun --external @modelcontextprotocol/sdk && bun build src/server/index.ts --outdir dist/server --target bun && bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist

author: Andrei Hasna <andrei@hasna.com>
